title: Make a Donation
subtitle: Your generosity helps us reach more communities and create lasting change. Every donation, no matter the size, makes a difference.

items.title: School Supplies
items.description: Provides school supplies for 5 children for an entire year.

items.title: Medical Care
items.description: Funds medical treatment for a family in need.

items.title: Community Training
items.description: Supports a community workshop for sustainable farming.

items.title: Build a Classroom
items.description: Helps build a classroom for 30 students.

faq.question: Where does my donation go?
faq.answer: 95% of all donations go directly to our programs and projects. The remaining 5% covers essential operational costs.

faq.question: Is my donation tax-deductible?
faq.answer: Yes, HopeBridge is a registered non-profit organization. All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law.

faq.question: Can I donate monthly?
faq.answer: Absolutely! You can choose to make a monthly recurring donation to provide sustained support for our programs.

faq.question: How do I get a receipt?
faq.answer: You will receive an email receipt immediately after your donation. You can also request a detailed receipt for tax purposes.
